infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aurora listens to your voice so it can respond as a calming companion. Audio is processed entirely on this device.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Aurora transcribes your voice on-device so it can respond as a calming companion. Speech never leaves your phone.

plugins.microphonePermission: Aurora listens to your voice so it can respond as a calming companion. Audio is processed entirely on this device.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Aurora transcribes your voice on-device so it can respond as a calming companion. Speech never leaves your phone.
